collected.policy_snippet: Food and Activity Diary Data may include sensitive personal information when the information indicates or allows someone to infer a health condition.
collected.purpose: The data is collected as part of the user's voluntary diary entries about dietary habits, activities, and other lifestyle information.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states they collect information to provide the best support and for various purposes, but does not provide concrete limits or justifications for why each specific type of health data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the policy and satisfy legal or reporting requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We disclose personal information to the categories of recipients described below: Our Business Partners. We may partner with other businesses to offer the Services and disclose your personal information to those business partners as necessary or appropriate for the purposes listed in this Policy.
shared.purpose: To offer the Services and for purposes listed in the policy.

health_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Health data is collected, stored, and shared with business partners and service providers, including international transfers to countries with different privacy laws. While users have deletion rights, retention is based on business needs and legal requirements.

collected.policy_snippet: Information related to any physiological conditions;
collected.purpose: To provide the Services, including features that allow users to share information about their dietary habits and activities.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states collection is for providing the Services and includes physiological conditions as part of Food and Activity Diary Data, but does not provide concrete limits or justification for why each specific type of physiological data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the policy, including providing the Services and satisfying legal requirements.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.

shared.policy_snippet: We disclose personal information to the categories of recipients described below:
shared.purpose: To provide the Services, show relevant ads and content, and improve the quality of the Services.

physiological_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physiological data is collected and may be shared with various third parties, including for targeted advertising. Data is transferred internationally to countries with different privacy laws. Retention is based on vague necessity criteria.

collected.policy_snippet: Body measurements (e.g., height, weight, and BMI);
collected.purpose: To provide the Services, which include tracking fitness and health goals.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'Body measurements (e.g., height, weight, and BMI);' as part of Food and Activity Diary Data collected directly from the user. It does not provide specific limits or justifications for why each specific measurement is necessary, only that it is part of the data used for the service.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes of providing the Services and for legal compliance.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We may disclose your personal information to other MyFitnessPal users in the context of specific features that are social in nature as part of the Services.
shared.purpose: To enable social features of the Services.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data such as body measurements is collected and may be shared with other users through social features. The data is transferred internationally, which may expose it to different legal standards. While a deletion right exists, retention is based on vague necessity criteria.

collected.policy_snippet: actions that you take while using the Services, information about how you interact with the Services, including the frequency and duration of your activities, information about the links you click, and other information about how you use the Services.
collected.purpose: To analyze usage of the Services, enhance and personalize the Services, and for targeted advertising.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'we collect personal information from you along the way' and lists broad categories of data collected, but does not provide concrete limits or justifications for why each type of behavioral data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Policy (including to satisfy our legal or reporting requirements), unless a longer retention period is required or allowed under law.
stored.purpose: To fulfill the purposes outlined in the policy, including providing Services, analyzing usage, and targeted advertising.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: The right to request that we delete your personal information (subject to certain exceptions prescribed by applicable law).

shared.policy_snippet: We may disclose your personal information, including device and browser information and activity and usage information, to our marketing and advertising partners, including social media platforms, third-party advertising networks, and other parties that assist us in serving, measuring the performance of, and optimizing our advertising campaigns.
shared.purpose: For targeted advertising and to measure and optimize advertising campaigns.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is collected, stored, and shared with marketing and advertising partners for targeted advertising, including cross-device tracking. Data is transferred internationally to countries with different privacy laws. While users can request deletion, there is no automatic deletion based on inactivity.
